title: SOL STATE_2_ABORT timing root-cause diagnosis
objective: Determine whether SOL semantic parity residuals are primarily caused by HTF cross pulse timing, reverse-spike pulse timing, same-bar close ordering, or unrelated entry-cycle drift before changing replay semantics.

forbidden_changes: Do not change replay semantics in offline_replay.py for this diagnosis task.
Do not change strategy.py or strategy.pine in this diagnosis task.
Do not overwrite samples/ or runs/ artifacts.

acceptance.row_selection: Diagnostics use symbol SOL, common TV/Python coverage, matched rows only; outside-artifact tail rows are excluded from semantic timing residuals.
acceptance.diagnostic_output: SOL detail report identifies STATE_2_ABORT timing residuals with signed exit deltas plus candidate cause buckets: htf_cross_pulse, reverse_spike_pulse, same_bar_close_or_fill_ordering, entry_cycle_drift, or unknown_state2_abort.
acceptance.first_fix_candidate: A single replay-rule candidate is named for the next task, supported by residual count, representative trade numbers, signed delta distribution, and cause bucket share.
acceptance.btc_evidence: FINDINGS.md records BTC metrics and SHA after verification.

verification_commands: cwd: Projects/Trading Value/MTS-V1 | uv run --no-project --with pytest --with pandas --with pyyaml python -m pytest tests/test_core5_parity_report.py tests/test_btc_parity_diff.py tests/test_btc_parity_trace.py -q -p no:cacheprovider

cwd: Projects/Trading Value/MTS-V1 | uv run --no-project python core5_parity_report.py --runs-dir runs --samples-dir samples --report parity_reports/core5_parity.md --bar-seconds 900 --examples 32 --gate baseline
cwd: Projects/Trading Value/MTS-V1 | uv run --no-project --with ruff ruff check btc_parity_diff.py core5_parity_report.py tests/test_btc_parity_diff.py tests/test_core5_parity_report.py
cwd: Projects/Trading Value/MTS-V1 | uv run --no-project python -m py_compile btc_parity_diff.py core5_parity_report.py
rollback_criteria: Diagnostics mix outside-artifact tail rows into semantic residuals.
